data.name: Rejected at the Altar, Claimed by the Cursed Alpha
data.summary: In the werewolf realm of Silvercrest, Seraphina, an Omega with the legendary "Silver Blood," faces public betrayal at her mating ceremony by her fiancé Damon, the heir. Humiliated, she voids their vow. Kael, Damon's cursed and outcast half-brother, steps forward to claim her. Their near-fatal bonding ritual triggers a miracle: her blood begins to cure his curse. As Kael's power awakens, Damon's schemes intensify. Through political strife and a final, brutal challenge under the moon, Kael embraces his destiny as the true Alpha King, with Seraphina as his Luna Queen—a story of betrayal broken by resilience, a curse healed by love, and a throne reclaimed by the rightful pair.

data.name: Mommy I'm not lying（updating）
data.summary: Evelyn forces her twins to wear "truth band". When Lily dies from an ignored allergy, the device stays red, leading Evelyn to accuse her corpse of "faking it". Even after being arrested, the delusional mother shrieks at Lily’s ghost, still branding her a "liar".

data.name: Back With Baby, Ex Regrets Deeply
data.summary: Vanessa was dumped by her fiancé Seth at the clerk's office. She married billionaire Grayson in an arranged marriage abroad. Three years later, she returns with their son, faces humiliation from Seth and Chloe, and Grayson's brutal revenge reveals his long-hidden love for her.

data.name: Daddy, You Don't Matter Anymore
data.summary: Aria accidentally uncovers her father’s secret affair and hidden child, only to be threatened and betrayed by him. Her gentle mother turns out to be a former finance elite who has secretly collected evidence of his embezzlement and asset transfer. She strikes back decisively, bringing down her cheating husband and his mistress. The mother and daughter break free and embrace independent new lives.

data.name: One Passionate Night, I Gave Birth to Two Dragons
data.summary: After a village girl named Willa gives birth to two tiny dragons, her own kingdom brands her children as monsters and her as a witch. Then royal guards arrive with an impossible decree: her vanished husband Tristan is actually the king, and her strange babies are to be named heirs. Trapped in a glittering palace filled with fear, jealousy, and court conspiracies, Willa must protect her children from nobles who want them dead. But when ancient royal blood awakens, the truth changes everything: her “monsters” may be the only future the kingdom has left.

data.name: My Husband Cheated With a girl Who Looks Like His Dead Love
data.summary: I came home from a business trip to a clogged bathroom drain. The plumber pulled out handfuls of used condoms. Handprints covered the mirror and the glass door. Those weren’t mine. I followed the trail and found my husband’s affair partner—his student, with the exact face of his dead first love. He spent a whole year turning himself into someone else’s fantasy. Ten years of my love meant nothing against a familiar face. No tears. No screaming. I handed him the evidence, the lawyer’s letter, and the divorce papers. Then I ripped the GPS tracker she hid in my car, stepped on the gas, and drove straight into the rest of my life.

data.name: TOO LATE! THE DAUGHTER OF OLYMPUS FORSAKES YOU[Updating]
data.summary:
On their tenth wedding anniversary, Selene's husband drives a blade through her heart — all for her half-sister. But death is not the end. The Fates answer her dying wish and hurl her back in time, to the very day she must choose a husband.
This time, she knows the truth: the man she once adored will one day destroy her. So she makes the one choice no one sees coming — Alexander, the infuriating rival who has clashed with her at every turn.
But in a world of scheming gods, treacherous lovers, and ancient power plays on Mount Olympus, choosing a different husband doesn't guarantee a different fate. As old enemies conspire and hidden affections unravel, Selene must fight not just for love, but for survival. A second chance. A dangerous gamble. And a love she never saw coming.

data.name: The Bonfire Betrayal
data.summary: In a mysterious town, women are taken by force in a brutal Groom’s Run. Ava waits three years for her love Lucas, only to discover he used a fake marriage license and plans to steal her sister Maya instead. Rescued by a stranger named Silas, Ava vanishes. Years later, she returns strong and unrecognizable—while Lucas is trapped in regret, begging for a second chance he’ll never get.

data.name: I Gave My Mate Away
data.summary: Reborn after being poisoned and killed by her fiancé Kaleb and the scheming Pearl, Elara gets a second chance to rewrite her fate. When Kaleb kneels publicly to beg for permission to take his late brother Silas’s widow Pearl as his second mate, Elara tears up their engagement. Shockingly, she chooses to marry Silas’s memorial tablet to defend the war hero’s honor. Just after the ceremony, the presumed-dead Silas returns alive. The scandalous affair and lies of Kaleb and Pearl are exposed, leading to their total ruin. Elara finally gains sincere love, supreme honor and a perfect new life with her fated mate Silas.

data.name: Rejected at the Altar, Claimed by the Cursed Alpha
data.summary: In the werewolf realm of Silvercrest, Seraphina, an Omega with the legendary "Silver Blood," faces public betrayal at her mating ceremony by her fiancé Damon, the heir. data.name: Mommy I'm not lying（updating）
data.summary: Evelyn forces her twins to wear "truth band". When Lily dies from an ignored allergy, the device stays red, leading Evelyn to accuse her corpse of "faking it". Even after being arrested, the delusional mother shrieks at Lily’s ghost, still branding her a "liar".

data.name: [Dubbed] Hidden Heir: Payback Time
data.summary: Jason, the young master of Watson Group, hid his identity to start as a car salesman. He eventually founded the RivAuto Group for his girlfriend Vivian. However, she was scornful of his poverty and left him for another wealthy heir. She even used her influence to suppress Jason. With his family's backing, Jason revealed his true identity, turning the tables on Vivian and her family...

data.name: The Father Decides the Outcome
data.summary: He was clearly the strongest man in the world, yet he was mistaken for a beggar.

data.name: Shadow's Mate
data.summary: Neglected hidden-blood princess Aria is dumped by her shallow fiancé Kalen at their wedding for manipulative schemer Lena. Three formidable beast monarchs grow obsessed with her: fated wolf king Seth, sly fox lord Alex, and loyal snake prince Kael who owes her a life-saving debt from a century prior. Cornered by Lena’s deadly ambush, Aria awakens dormant godly power and executes her foe. Three mighty rulers chase her earnestly, forcing the newly crowned powerful queen into a tricky romantic pick.

data.name: Back With Baby, Ex Regrets Deeply
data.summary: Vanessa was dumped by her fiancé Seth at the clerk's office. She married billionaire Grayson in an arranged marriage abroad. Three years later, she returns with their son, faces humiliation from Seth and Chloe, and Grayson's brutal revenge reveals his long-hidden love for her.

data.name: [Dubbed]Grateful for Misguided Youth
data.summary: Reborn Princess Evelyn Sinclair must navigate past and present entanglements with George Sterling, Logan Ashford, and Jenna Lane. After unveiling Jenna's lies and breaking ties with George, Evelyn ultimately chooses Logan as her husband, finding both love and redemption.

data.name: The God of War's Forbidden Bride
data.summary: It tells the story of Selene, Zeus's beloved daughter, who is killed by her husband Skiron and her demigod sister Daphne working together, with her father Zeus also falling into peril. Blessed by the Three Fates, she returns to the day when she is to choose her husband. Resolved to abandon her past misplaced love, she embarks on a revenge against her enemies and chooses Alexander, her former bitter rival, as her spouse.

data.name: [Dubbed]Destined Reunion
data.summary: Logan Campbell's desperate search for Ruby and young Nolan ignites family turmoil, marriage pressure, and questions of bloodline. At a grand birthday feast, a child's bold claim sparks the revelation of a hidden son. Secrets unravel, ties are tested, and the Campbell legacy is pushed to the brink of change.

data.name: The Mute Luna's Revenge
data.summary: Evelyn sacrificed her voice to save exiled Alpha Ryder with a life-binding spell, only to be publicly humiliated and betrayed when he chose Freya. Heartbroken, she married the ruthless Northern Alpha Kieran. As Ryder finally learns the devastating truth and begs for forgiveness, Evelyn has already found her true mate and unshakable happiness.
